13:I[35250,["/_next/static/chunks/0fx4xc-kwoar9.js","/_next/static/chunks/0n4z.7yu76je-.js","/_next/static/chunks/0x.2q9jb~6ekr.js","/_next/static/chunks/09z4kwq9sy.a2.js","/_next/static/chunks/0fekzj03ltn5y.js","/_next/static/chunks/0pqew2nbfoy2f.js","/_next/static/chunks/07.05twov8012.js","/_next/static/chunks/113wy2s~ukj5p.js","/_next/static/chunks/0se1rt9lzyib_.js","/_next/static/chunks/0e1gsufr5shdc.js","/_next/static/chunks/13n60-fppanm4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0g~f0923b0wjv.js"],"MermaidDiagram"]
11:[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Data Flow"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"How information moves through Mnemosyne's memory tiers."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Write Path",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","$L13",null,{}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Agent observes"}]," an event, conversation turn, or tool result"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Working Memory"}]," stores the raw entry with metadata"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Indices"}]," are updated synchronously (vector + FTS5)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Sleep Consolidator"}]," (async) processes entries during sleep cycles"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promotion"}]," moves high-importance entries to Episodic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Extraction"}]," pulls structured facts into Semantic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Eviction"}]," removes low-importance entries per policy"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Read Path",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","$L13",null,{}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Query"}]," enters the Retrieval Engine"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Parallel dispatch"}]," to vector, text, and graph indices"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Rank Fusion"}]," combines scores using configurable weights"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Working Memory"}]," assembles the final context window"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Agent receives"}]," consolidated, relevant context"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Consolidation Flow",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","$L13",null,{}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Event Lifecycle",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Stage | Location | Trigger | Duration |\n|-------|----------|---------|----------|\n| Ingestion | Working Memory | Agent observation | Immediate |\n| Indexing | Vector + FTS5 | Write completion | <50ms |\n| Consolidation | Episodic + Semantic | Sleep cycle | Minutes to hours |\n| Retrieval | Working Memory | Agent query | <100ms |\n| Eviction | Deleted | Retention policy | Configurable |"}]]
